title: Filipino Fish Noodle Soup
description: A delicious and hearty Filipino-inspired noodle soup made with fish, noodles, and mouthwatering aromatics.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: any white fish such as tilapia or cod

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger; sauté until onion is translucent.
Add fish fillets; cook until they start to flake apart.
Add noodles, fish sauce, salt, and pepper; stir well.
Pour in water to cover the ingredients; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; simmer for 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.
Enjoy your delicious and hearty Filipino-inspired noodle soup!
